notes: New OCR Region tool: drag a rectangle over any part of a page to copy just that area's text.
Digitally Sign can now use a certificate from the Windows certificate store (smart cards, enterprise certs).
Signatures can include a trusted RFC-3161 timestamp, so they stay valid after the certificate expires.
Add a visible signature box (name, date, reason) in a corner of the first page.
Optionally embed long-term validation (LTV) info so signatures can be checked years later.
